title: ononis natrix subvar. tomentosa
intro: Ononis natrix subvar. tomentosa, commonly known as the Burdock plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been used in herbal preparations for their health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and promoting skin health. Traditionally, Burdock root tea, tincture, and infusions have been used to prepare herbal remedies that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
